description: Tome and book item definitions â€” scroll/book spell codes and costs.

Name.description: Internal name identifier. Not read by 1.13c engine

Namco.description: Book name completion suffix (e.g. of Identify, of Town Portal). Not read by 1.13c engine

Completed.description: Item completion flag. Not read by 1.13c engine

scrollspellcode.description: Item code for the scroll version of this spell

bookspellcode.description: Item code for the tome/book version of this spell

SpellOffset.description: Spell effect offset index. Not read by 1.13c engine

SpellIcon.description: Spell icon graphic index (-1 = none). Not read by 1.13c engine

SkillScrollOffset.description: Skill index offset for scroll spell lookup. Not read by 1.13c engine

SkillBookOffset.description: Skill index offset for book spell lookup. Not read by 1.13c engine

basecost.description: Base gold cost of the book item

costpercharge.description: Additional gold cost per remaining charge
